_comment: Buyable item definitions — 1:1 from world.cpp:1380-1402 LoadBuyableItems(). enumId matches world.h BUY_* enum (BUY_NONE=0, BUY_LASER=1, ...). agencyRestriction: -1=none, 0=Noxis, 1=Lazarus, 2=Caliber, 3=Static, 4=Blackrose. techChoice values are 1<<N bitmasks. Do not change during GAS migration.

items.name: Laser
items.description:
Immediately after shield technology
was capable of dampening weapon
effects, the Frost-Light laser was
released.
 
Two hits should remove any standard
shield, but very little damage is
done to an unshielded target.

items.name: Rocket
items.description:
Long range, high yield mini-warheads
will devastate any unshielded
opponent.
 
Includes an attached camera for
in-flight kill tracking.

items.name: Flamer Ammo
items.description:
Kills any unshielded target.
 
No shield has been made that the
Crucible flamer cannot ignore.
 
Deadly at close range.

items.name: Health Pack
items.description:
A small portable boost for Noxis
agents in the field.
 
Restores lost health, but must be
manually applied.

items.name: Lazarus Tract
items.description:
The definitive and unquestionable
truth about Mars' oddest and most
powerful religious organization.
 
Helpful in converting disbelieving
citizens to your cause.

items.name: Security Pass
items.description:
Unlimited security access.
 
Government agents will ignore you
in the field.

items.name: Virus
items.description:
A portable virus whipped up by the
snotty underage hackers of Static.
 
Gives you immediate control over
cannons and robots in the field.
 
May harm enemy in-base weapon
stations.

items.name: Poison
items.description:
Hollowhead poisons are pernicious
bio-rad toxins, administered via
injection.
 
Causes the victim to lose health
until cured, multiple doses
recommended.

items.name: E.M.P. Bomb
items.description:
Upon detonation it emits a
electromagnetic pulse that drops all
shields in a several mile radius.
 
The user is protected by a frequency
modulator that comes with the
device.

items.name: Shaped Bomb
items.description:
Derived from the plasma bomb, this
bomb focus its destructive force 
upwards.

items.name: Plasma Bomb
items.description:
An indescriminate terrorist device
capable of killing even a
perfectly healthy opponent.
 
A core explosion with multiple
shrapnel tendrils, extremely
lethal.

items.name: Neutron Bomb
items.description:
A portable neutron bomb that
swiftly elimates all opposition in
the entire region.
 
The only defense against it is to
be in your base.
 
Use with extreme caution.

items.name: Plasma Detonator
items.description:
A remote detonation device.
 
Deploy in strategic locations and
detonate from a safe distance.

items.name: Fixed Cannon
items.description:
A stationary laser turret with
excellent offensive and defensive
capabilities.
 
This mechanical friend in the
field can do your work for you.

items.name: Flare
items.description:
The Orion Flare is a stationary
mini-torch looks like a bomb in
flight but has a more lingering
effect.
 
Useful for blocking off tight areas
or herding enemies.

items.name: Poison Flare
items.description:
A more devious strain of the Orion
Flare, the Poison Flare
incapacitates its victims in seconds
and leaves them poisoned as
well.
 
Environmentally disastrous, but
highly lethal.

items.name: Camera
items.description:
A remote viewing device that allows
an agent to monitor an area on
his/her HUD.
 
Can be discreetly removed in a puff
of smoke.
 
When secrecy is a way of life.

items.name: Base Door
items.description:
The ability to relocate the warp
door to your base.

items.name: Base Defense
items.description:
Internal security systems to deter
would-be ambushers.
 
In-base laser turrets.
 
Multiple purchases increase turret
structure durability.

items.name: Insider Info
items.description:
Your contacts on the inside can
give you information about secrets.
 
For a price of course.
